import collections

class SuffixTreeNode:
    def __init__(self, start_idx=None, end_idx=None):
        self.children = collections.OrderedDict()
        self.suffix_indices = []

        self.start_idx = start_idx
        self.end_idx = end_idx

    def add_suffix_index(self, index):
        self.suffix_indices.append(index)

class SuffixTree:
    def __init__(self, text):
        self.text = text + '$'
        self.root = SuffixTreeNode()
        self._build_tree()
        self._collect_suffix_indices_post_order(self.root)

    def _build_tree(self):
        for i in range(len(self.text)):
            self._add_suffix(i)

    def _add_suffix(self, suffix_start_original_idx):
        current_node = self.root
        current_suffix_start_pos_in_text = suffix_start_original_idx
        remaining_suffix_len = len(self.text) - suffix_start_original_idx

        while True:
            first_char_of_remaining = self.text[current_suffix_start_pos_in_text]

            if first_char_of_remaining in current_node.children:
                child_node = current_node.children[first_char_of_remaining]
                
                edge_len = child_node.end_idx - child_node.start_idx

                match_len = 0
                while match_len < remaining_suffix_len and \
                      match_len < edge_len and \
                      self.text[current_suffix_start_pos_in_text + match_len] == \
                      self.text[child_node.start_idx + match_len]:
                    match_len += 1

                if match_len == edge_len:
                    current_node = child_node
                    current_suffix_start_pos_in_text += match_len
                    remaining_suffix_len -= match_len
                    
                    if remaining_suffix_len == 0:
                        current_node.add_suffix_index(suffix_start_original_idx)
                        break 
                    continue 

                elif match_len == remaining_suffix_len:
                    new_internal_node = SuffixTreeNode(
                        start_idx=child_node.start_idx,
                        end_idx=child_node.start_idx + match_len
                    )
                    new_internal_node.add_suffix_index(suffix_start_original_idx)

                    child_node.start_idx += match_len
                    new_internal_node.children[self.text[child_node.start_idx]] = child_node

                    current_node.children[first_char_of_remaining] = new_internal_node
                    break 

                else:
                    new_internal_node = SuffixTreeNode(
                        start_idx=child_node.start_idx,
                        end_idx=child_node.start_idx + match_len
                    )
                    
                    child_node.start_idx += match_len
                    new_internal_node.children[self.text[child_node.start_idx]] = child_node

                    new_leaf_node = SuffixTreeNode(
                        start_idx=current_suffix_start_pos_in_text + match_len,
                        end_idx=len(self.text)
                    )
                    new_leaf_node.add_suffix_index(suffix_start_original_idx)
                    new_internal_node.children[self.text[current_suffix_start_pos_in_text + match_len]] = new_leaf_node

                    current_node.children[first_char_of_remaining] = new_internal_node
                    break 

            else:
                new_leaf_node = SuffixTreeNode(
                    start_idx=current_suffix_start_pos_in_text,
                    end_idx=len(self.text)
                )
                new_leaf_node.add_suffix_index(suffix_start_original_idx)
                current_node.children[first_char_of_remaining] = new_leaf_node
                break
                
    def _collect_suffix_indices_post_order(self, node):
        if not node.children:
            return set(node.suffix_indices)
        
        all_indices = set(node.suffix_indices)
        for char, child_node in node.children.items():
            all_indices.update(self._collect_suffix_indices_post_order(child_node))
        
        node.suffix_indices = sorted(list(all_indices))
        return all_indices
